KillerOverride.Name: The Wraith
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Midwich Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon or Coal Tower 1 Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On Midwich Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud.

On Dead Dawg Saloon or Coal Tower 1 Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Hillbilly
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint on all maps.

Survivors brings One Annotated Blueprint & One Vigo's Shroud on all maps.

KillerOverride.Name: The Nurse
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 or Father Campbell's Chapel Killer Brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

Survivors bring Annotated Blueprint AND Vigo's Shroud for ALL maps.

KillerOverride.Name: The Shape
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings either Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On The Underground Complex or The Treatment Theatre Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

On The Underground Complex or Treatment Theatre Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud.

Survivors will not incur penalty if they bring Annotated Blueprint on Treatment Theatre or The Underground Complex.

KillerOverride.Name: The Hag
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard & Midwich Killer brings Cut Coin

On Toba Landing brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On Wrecker's Yard and Toba Landing Survivors bring BOTH Annotated Blueprint AND Vigo's Shroud.

On Midwich Survivors bring ONLY Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Doctor
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Huntress
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 and Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Cannibal
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
If map is Wretched Shop or Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

If map is Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On all maps Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Nightmare
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all maps Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Pig
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Ormond Lake Mine Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On Midwich or The Underground Complex Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Ormond Lake Mine Survivors bring One Annotated Blueprint and One Vigo's Shroud

On Midwich or The Underground Complex Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud.

Survivors will not incur penalty if they bring Annotated Blueprint on Midwich or The Underground Complex.

KillerOverride.Name: The Clown
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Grim Pantry or Wretched Shop Killer brings one Bloodied Blueprint or one Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Spirit
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 or Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On Wrecker's Yard Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud & One Annotated Blueprint.

On Coal Tower 1 or Dead Dawg Saloon Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud & One Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Legion
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon or Ormond Lake Mine Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Plague
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wrecker's Yard Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

On Azarov's Resting Place or Suffocation Pit 1 Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud, one Annotated Blueprint AND one Bloodied Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Ghost Face
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On Treatment Theatre or The Underground Complex Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon Survivors bring One Annotated Blueprint and One Vigo's Shroud

On Treatment Theatre or The Underground Complex Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud.

Survivors will not incur penalty if they bring Annotated Blueprint on Treatment Theatre or The Underground Complex.

KillerOverride.Name: The Demogorgon
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard and Azarov's Resting Place Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 Killer brings Bloodied or Torn BLueprint.

On Wrecker's Yard and Coal Tower 1 Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

On Azarov's Resting Place Survivors bring one Bloodied Blueprint, One Annotated Blueprint and One Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Oni
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all Maps Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all Maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Deathslinger
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all maps Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Suffocation Pit 1 and Azarov's Resting Place Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud, One Annotated Blueprint, and one Bloodied Blueprint.

On Wrecker's Yard Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Executioner
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard, the killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 2 and Rancid Abattoir, the killer brings Bloodied Blueprint OR Torn Blueprint.

On all maps survivors bring Vigo's Shroud AND Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Blight
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Coal Tower 2 or Blood Lodge Killer brings Torn or Bloodied Blueprint.

On Suffocation Pit 1 Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 2 or Blood Lodge Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud and One Annotated Blueprint.

On Suffocation Pit 1 Survivors Bring One Vigo's Shroud, One Annotated Blueprint and One Bloodied Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Twins
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all maps Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wrecker's Yard Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

On Suffocation Pit 1 or Azarov's Resting Place Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud, one Annotated Blueprint, and one Bloodied Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Trickster
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon or Father Campbell's Chapel Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Nemesis
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wretched Shop or Father Campbell's Chapel Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Cenobite
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Coal Tower 1 or Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings either Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On all maps Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and One Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Artist
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Suffocation Pit 1 and Azarov's Resting Place Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wretched Shop Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On Suffocation Pit 1 and Azarov's Resting Place Survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud, One Annotated Blueprint, and one Bloodied Blueprint.

On Wretched Shop Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Dredge
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Thompson House Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On Midwich or The Underground Complex Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Thompson House Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud & One Annotated Blueprint

On Midwich or The Underground Complex Survivors bring One Vigo's Shroud

KillerOverride.Name: The Mastermind
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all maps Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Knight
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Ironworks of Misery 1 or Coal Tower 2, Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Skull Merchant
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard, killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 or Wretched Shop, killer bring Bloodied Blueprint OR Torn Blueprint.

On all maps, survivors bring Vigo's Shroud AND Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Singularity
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 2 and Dead Dawg Saloon Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Xenomorph
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all Maps Killer brings either Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all Maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Good Guy
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard, killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 or Azarov's Resting Place, killer brings Bloodied Blueprint OR Torn Blueprint.

On Wrecker's Yard or Coal Tower 1, survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

On Azarov's Resting Place, survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud, one Annotated Blueprint, and one Bloodied Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Unknown
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 1 or 2 Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps Survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Lich
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard, killer brings Cut Coin.

On Coal Tower 2 or Dead Dawg Saloon, killer brings Bloodied Blueprint OR Torn Blueprint.

On all maps, survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud AND one Annotated Blueprint.

Survivors are allowed to loot Vecna's Treasure Chests, however the Hand and Eye of Vecna items (the items received for rolling a 20) are not to be pulled from a chest should they be rolled. Similarly, normal items cannot be used, but they are allowed to be pulled out of the chest to be immediately dropped so as to allow the chest to be reused. Survivors are permitted to use the rest of Vecna's Magic Items.

KillerOverride.Name: The Dark Lord
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wrecker's Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wretched Shop or Coal Tower 2 Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

KillerOverride.Name: The Houndmaster
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Dead Dawg Saloon or Coal Tower 2 Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On all maps survivors bring one Annotated Blueprint and one Vigo's Shroud.

KillerOverride.Name: The Ghoul
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On all maps Killer brings Bloodied or Torn Blueprint

On all maps Survivors bring BOTH One Annotated Blueprint AND One Vigo's Shroud

KillerOverride.Name: The Animatronic
KillerOverride.KillerNotes:
On Wretched Shop Killer brings Bloodied Blueprint or Torn Blueprint.

On Midwich or Wreckers' Yard Killer brings Cut Coin.

On Wreckers' Yard or Wretched Shop survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud and one Annotated Blueprint.

On Midwich survivors bring one Vigo's Shroud.

Survivors will not incur penalty if they bring Annotated Blueprint on Midwich.
